evals.prompt: 我第一次安装，帮我创建本地身份 Alice，然后确认当前身份。
evals.expected_output: Uses identity create/list/who flow and includes doctor verification after first create.

evals.prompt: 把当前身份切换到 David，如果不存在就创建，再告诉我现在是谁。
evals.expected_output: Uses list/assign-or-create/who deterministic switch workflow without touching runtime files.

evals.prompt: 先看看线上有哪些服务，再帮我下单一个远程任务。
evals.expected_output: Should NOT trigger identity-manage as primary. Should hand off to network-manage then call-remote-service.
